title: Sable & Finch Realty listing tour: branded 16:9 master property walkthrough with 9:16 reel + 1:1 square cutdowns, licensed music bed, cleaned agent narration, color-match grade reference, YouTube thumbnail, and on-brand lower-third / end-card graphic plates
one_line_ask: Turn Sable & Finch Realty's four raw handheld property-walkthrough / exterior clips, flat logo, warm brand look-reference, scratch agent narration, shot list, and listing copy into a branded listing tour package: a polished ~90s 16:9 master (sequenced best shots with a licensed music bed under a cleaned narration), a 9:16 reel and 1:1 square social cutdown, a graded color-match reference the editor matches every clip to, a 1280x720 YouTube thumbnail, a vector logo plus on-brand lower-third and end-card graphic plates and type spec, all packaged onto a Firefly board and into a dated CC handoff folder.

qc.transcript: Welcome to 12 Heronwood Lane, a light-filled coastal farmhouse where every room tells a story. From the moment you step inside, you'll feel the warmth and character that define this exceptional property. Imagine sun-drenched mornings in the open-concept living area. assets.name: sablefinch_logo.png

issues: Very faint, nearly invisible watermark/ghosting shape in the background (barely perceptible, but present).
Slight color banding in the brass rule (minor, likely from export).
Checkerboard transparency pattern visible (expected for PNG with alpha — not a defect)
Very faint watermark/ghost text visible in background (likely artifact from generation, minor)
Bird mark is outline/line-art style which is correct but slightly thin at this resolution — may need stroke weight increase before vectorizing

assets.note: Regenerated flat white-bg logo via gemini-3-pro-image, then knocked out to real transparent alpha and centered on a 2400x1400 canvas (baseline had a baked-in checkerboard). Crisp, vectorizable.

issues: Very slight warm color cast overall (acceptable per brief as designer-correctable)
Minimal luminance noise visible in shadow areas near fireplace (within brief tolerance)
Built-in shelf items slightly soft at edges (acceptable source asset quality)

assets.name: raw_walkthrough_kitchen.mp4

issues: Lighting appears slightly too clean/polished for truly raw handheld footage
Pendant lights cluster feels slightly CG in specularity

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~15s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: raw_walkthrough_entry_living.mp4

issues: Slight overexposure on windows (expected for daylight blowout, not penalized)
Room appears fully furnished/staged rather than mid-walkthrough entry moment, but consistent with real estate video

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~18s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: raw_walkthrough_primary_suite.mp4

issues: King bed with linen bedding is not visible.
Double vanity is not visible.
King bed not visible in this particular frame (camera has panned past it to the ensuite/bathroom reveal portion of the sequence)
Slight fisheye/wide-angle distortion consistent with phone lens — acceptable for handheld footage

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~14s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: raw_exterior_frontage_yard.mp4

issues: The siding appears to be horizontal lap siding rather than explicitly board-and-batten, though it still fits the 'modern coastal farmhouse' aesthetic.
Frame appears to be from the push-in drone/low angle phase only — backyard/plunge pool sequence not visible in this single frame, but that is expected for a mid-clip still grab
Slight lens flare from golden hour sun on left side — natural and appropriate
No severe AI artifacts detected
Landscaping and architectural details are clean and consistent with brief

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~16s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).
